pageProps.content:
["$r",null,null,{"children":[["$r","p",null,{"children":["镜像站提供了 Julia 的官方包注册表 ",["$r","a",null,{"href":"https://github.com/JuliaRegistries/General","rel":"nofollow","children":"General"}]," 镜像来加速 Julia 包的安装。"]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["一些镜像站也提供了 Julia 二进制程序的镜像，关于其使用请参考 ",["$r","a",null,{"href":"../julia-releases/","children":"Julia Releases 帮助"}],"."]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["注：本镜像的使用需要 Julia ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"v1.4.0"}]," 或更新的版本。"]}],"
",["$r","h2",null,{"id":"使用方法","children":"使用方法"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["只需要设置环境变量 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"JULIA_PKG_SERVER"}]," 即可切换镜像。若成功切换镜像，则能通过 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"versioninfo()"}]," 查询到相关信息，例如："]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-0","codeLanguage":"julia"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["若不设置该环境变量则默认使用官方服务器 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"pkg.julialang.org"}]," 作为上游。"]}],"
",["$r","h3",null,{"id":"临时使用","children":"临时使用"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"不同系统和命令行下设置环境变量的方式各不相同，在命令行下可以通过以下方式来临时修改环境变量"}],"
",["$r","ul",null,{"children":["
",["$r","li",null,{"children":["
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"Linux Bash"}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-1","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
"]}],"
",["$r","li",null,{"children":["
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"Windows Powershell:"}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-2","codeLanguage":"powershell"}],"
"]}],"
"]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["也可以利用 JuliaCN 社区维护的中文本地化工具包 ",["$r","a",null,{"href":"https://github.com/JuliaCN/JuliaZH.jl","rel":"nofollow","children":"JuliaZH"}]," 来进行切换："]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-3","codeLanguage":"julia"}],"
",["$r","h3",null,{"id":"永久使用","children":"永久使用"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["不同系统和命令行下永久设定环境变量的方式也不相同，例如 Linux Bash 下可以通过修改 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"~/.bashrc"}]," 文件实现该目的："]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-4","codeLanguage":"bash","filepath":"~/.bashrc","enableQuickSetup":true}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["此外，这里再提供一种针对 Julia 的全平台通用的方式：",["$r","code",null,{"children":"$JULIA_DEPOT_PATH/config/startup.jl"}],"            ( 默认为 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"~/.julia/config/startup.jl"}]," ) 文件定义了每次启动 Julia 时都会执行的命令，编辑该文件，添加以下内容即可："]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-5","codeLanguage":"julia","filepath":"~/.julia/config/startup.jl","enableQuickSetup":true}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["也可以选择使用 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"JuliaZH"}]," 来一键修改/创建 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"startup.jl"}]," 文件："]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-6","codeLanguage":"julia"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["若要临时禁止，可以通过 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"julia --startup-file=no"}]," 来取消执行 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"startup.jl"}]," 文件。"]}],"
",["$r","h2",null,{"id":"常见问题","children":"常见问题"}],"
",["$r","h3",null,{"id":"为什么有些包的下载还是很慢","children":"为什么有些包的下载还是很慢？"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"有两类数据不会被镜像："}],"
",["$r","ul",null,{"children":["
",["$r","li",null,{"children":["在 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"deps/build.jl"}]," 文件中硬编码的下载地址，例如 ",["$r","a",null,{"href":"https://github.com/jheinen/GR.jl/blob/70f025d5cb439d036409f1985107cb5e1615097f/deps/build.jl#L116","rel":"nofollow","children":"GR"}],"."]}],"
",["$r","li",null,{"children":["在 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"Artifacts.toml"}]," 中没有给出 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"download"}]," 项的资源，例如 ",["$r","a",null,{"href":"https://github.com/JuliaImages/TestImages.jl/blob/eaa94348df619c65956e8cfb0032ecddb7a29d3a/Artifacts.toml","rel":"nofollow","children":"TestImages"}],"."]}],"
"]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["在安装包含这两类数据的包时，其数据依然是从原始地址进行下载，因此若网络不稳定则可能会在 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"build"}]," 阶段报错。"]}],"
",["$r","h3",null,{"id":"为什么注册表还是从原地址下载","children":"为什么注册表还是从原地址下载？"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["Julia ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"v1.4.0"}]," 之前的版本采用的是 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"git clone"}]," 的方式拉取注册表。为了保持兼容性，如果现有的注册表是一个完整的 git 仓库的话，那么即使设置了 PkgServer 作为上游镜像也依然会通过 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"git"}]," 来进行更新，换句话说，不会通过镜像站来下载注册表数据。"]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["以默认注册表 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"General"}]," 为例，只需要手动将其重置到镜像站即可："]}],"
",["$r","ol",null,{"children":["
",["$r","li",null,{"children":["删除当前注册表：",["$r","code",null,{"children":"(@v1.4) pkg> registry rm General"}]]}],"
",["$r","li",null,{"children":["从镜像站下载/拉取注册表： ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"(@v1.4) pkg> registry add General"}]," -- 将无法在旧 Julia 版本中更新注册表"]}],"
"]}],"
",["$r","h3",null,{"id":"为什么有些包还是从原地址下载","children":"为什么有些包还是从原地址下载？"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"镜像站只镜像注册表中记录的包，因此如果某些包是通过指定 URL 的方式来安装的话，那么该包的更新不会从镜像站进行下载。"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"这常见于那些还未注册的包及其版本，例如："}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-7","codeLanguage":"julia"}]]}]

compiledTemplates.template-0:
{code: function (c,p,i) { var t=this;t.b(i=i||"");t.b("julia> versioninfo()");t.b("
" + i);t.b("Julia Version 1.4.1");t.b("
" + i);t.b("Commit 381693d3df* (2020-04-14 17:20 UTC)");t.b("
" + i);t.b("Platform Info:");t.b("
" + i);t.b("  OS: Linux (x86_64-pc-linux-gnu)");t.b("
" + i);t.b("  CPU: Intel(R) Core(TM) i7-6800K CPU @ 3.40GHz");t.b("
" + i);t.b("  WORD_SIZE: 64");t.b("
" + i);t.b("  LIBM: libopenlibm");t.b("
" + i);t.b("  LLVM: libLLVM-8.0.1 (ORCJIT, broadwell)");t.b("
" + i);t.b("Environment:");t.b("
" + i);t.b("  JULIA_PKG_SERVER = ");t.b(t.v(t.f("endpoint",c,p,0)));return t.fl(); },partials: {}, subs: {  }}
compiledTemplates.template-1: {code: function (c,p,i) { var t=this;t.b(i=i||"");t.b("  export JULIA_PKG_SERVER=");t.b(t.v(t.f("endpoint",c,p,0)));return t.fl(); },partials: {}, subs: {  }}
compiledTemplates.template-3: {code: function (c,p,i) { var t=this;t.b(i=i||"");t.b("using JuliaZH # 在 using 时会自动切换到国内的镜像站");t.b("\n" + i);t.b("JuliaZH.set_mirror(\"BFSU\") # 也可以选择手动切换到 BFSU 镜像");t.b("\n" + i);t.b("JuliaZH.mirrors # 查询记录的上游信息");return t.fl(); },partials: {}, subs: {  }}
compiledTemplates.template-6:
{code: function (c,p,i) { var t=this;t.b(i=i||"");t.b("# 以 BFSU 镜像站为例");t.b("
" + i);t.b("julia> JuliaZH.generate_startup("default")");t.b("
" + i);t.b("┌ Info: 添加 PkgServer");t.b("
" + i);t.b("│   服务器地址 = "https://pkg.julialang.org"");t.b("
" + i);t.b("└   配置文件 = "/root/.julia/config"");t.b("
");t.b("
" + i);t.b("julia> JuliaZH.generate_startup("BFSU")");t.b("
" + i);t.b("┌ Info: 更新 PkgServer");t.b("
" + i);t.b("│   原服务器地址 = "https://pkg.julialang.org"");t.b("
" + i);t.b("│   新服务器地址 = "https://mirrors.bfsu.edu.cn/julia"");t.b("
" + i);t.b("└   配置文件 = "/root/.julia/config"");return t.fl(); },partials: {}, subs: {  }}
compiledTemplates.template-7: {code: function (c,p,i) { var t=this;t.b(i=i||"");t.b("]add Flux#master");t.b("\n" + i);t.b("]add https://github.com/FluxML/Flux.jl.git");t.b("\n" + i);t.b("Pkg.add(PackageSpec(url=\"https://github.com/FluxML/Flux.jl.git\"))");return t.fl(); },partials: {}, subs: {  }}
